title: Request timed out in Supabase Vector Store integration
symptom: When querying the Supabase Vector Store, the request takes an excessively long time and eventually times out, displaying 'Request timed out.'
applies_when: Embedding node configured with custom settings
not_this_if: Embedding node is left with default settings
root_cause: The timeout error occurs because the embedding node settings were incorrectly configured. Custom settings can lead to inefficient processing or excessive resource demands, causing the request to exceed the allowed time limit.
fix_steps: Open the Embeddings OpenAI node settings
Remove any custom settings and keep it clean
Select only the model you want to use
Save the workflow and retry the query
agent_instruction: Reset the Embeddings OpenAI node settings to default and select only the desired model.
